This '''unidentified Rebel Vanguard''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was recruited by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Col Serra]] to join [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliances]]' new elite fighting unit. During his career as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] he was trained and became a member of the [[Rebel Vanguard/Legends|Rebel vanguard division]]. During the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], when [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] ordered the evacuation of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], he was [[Telekinesis/Legends|force choked]] by [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] when the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] overran [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'' {{1st}}
